# UK Housing Decision Support

> Explainable neighbourhood (MSOA) indicators for England & Wales, built from
> nine official open-data sources. Every score is shown beside the raw fact
> behind it. Indicators, not verdicts — we never label an area "safe" or
> "unsafe", and we do not value individual properties.

## What this site does

- Scores ~7,264 neighbourhoods on five 0–100 indicators: affordability, safety,
  energy efficiency, flood resilience, convenience.
- The overall score is a weighted average of those five; visitors set the weights.
- A listing checker bands an asking rent/price against the local typical
  (manual entry; no portal scraping).

## Key pages

- /search: rank areas by user-set priorities, filter by budget and region.
- /check: check a listing's area and price-vs-local band.
- /area/{slug}: the full "receipt" for one neighbourhood — scores beside facts.
- /methodology: scoring method, confidence handling, and data sources.

## Data & limits

- Sources: HM Land Registry, ONS rents (incl. per-bedroom), EPC, Police API,
  Planning Data API, Environment Agency flood data, OpenStreetMap, ONS geography.
- Area-level only; some figures are provisional and subject to revision.
- Missing data lowers an area's confidence; it is never scored as zero.
